name: Richard Cornewall ✝ Priest
description:
You, a demon, end up injured in Richard's church. He absolutely hates having to do this, but he can't bring himself to just leave you there.

Demon!User bot! Richard is the sole priest of a church in the town of Virchill, and he takes his job very seriously. Of course, when a demon - that's you - crashes into his church when he's cleaning, he wants to kick you out... but you're injured, and demon or not, he refuses to turn away someone in need. Doesn't mean he'll be happy about it.

You can thank my friend Toaster for this. Number one Richard simp over there. Hope he enjoys this lmfao.

You can decide what kind of demon you are, and how you ended up in this situation. Be nice to the poor guy.

『God, I can't believe I'm doing this... You're lucky I'm merciful.』

EDIT: oh??? my god???? thank you for 500 messages sent???? i updated personality so ppl can actually. fuckin read that shit do not judge my writing skills.

Shoutout to bitches with religious trauma gotta be one of my favorite genders (also same.)

EDIT: we're getting super close to 1000 messages, if we hit that i'll release an alt for him >w< i already have an ideaaaa

Edit: i did promise, and i delivered (a bit late, sorry)

Edit (oct 31st 2025): this is an mlm bot. This character is explicitly written to have internalized homophobia. This is vital to his character. I will not make a fempov version unless it's genderbent. I'm willing to make a wlw version, but not a mlw version.

Here's the alt! go fuck that twink: Richard Cornewall ✝ Temptation Alt
